heading: This Afternoon
text: Variable clouds. Slight chance of a shower or thunderstorm northeast, mainly near the Vermont/Québec border. Highs in the mid to upper 70s, around 80 in the Champlain, Connecticut, and Hudson valleys, and some lower 70s northeast. Northwest winds 5 to 10 mph, gusting to 20 mph.

heading: Tonight
text: Partly cloudy. Patchy valley fog late, mainly east of the Greens. Lows in the low to mid 50s, except mid 50s to around 60 in the Champlain and St. Lawrence valleys. Light and variable winds.

heading: Thursday
text: Patchy valley fog early, then sun filtering through increasing high clouds. A rising chance of afternoon showers in New York; chance eastward to the Green Mountains, mainly late in the day. Highs from the mid 70s to around 80. Winds becoming south 5 to 10 mph.
